heading: Expiration of statutory authorities
label: 3513 Expiration of statutory authorities
text: The authorities contained in this chapter shall expire on .September 30, 1984
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this title”, meaning title IV of , , , which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of title IV to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 96–5393 Stat. 371Aug. 14, 1979
